description: Unified error taxonomy for tasks, workflows, evaluators, and public endpoints within the AgentBase ecosystem.
goals: Provide a consistent, machine-readable error taxonomy.
Ensure all components of AgentBase report failures in a predictable format.
Enable workflows and evaluators to branch or score based on error types.
Support debugging, observability, and safe recovery.

codes.VALIDATION_INPUT_MISMATCH: Input does not conform to the task's input_schema.
codes.VALIDATION_OUTPUT_MISMATCH: Task output does not conform to the output_schema.
codes.VALIDATION_SCHEMA_ERROR: Schema itself is malformed or incompatible.

execution.description: Errors occurring during task or workflow execution.

codes.EXECUTION_FAILURE: Task execution failed due to internal logic.
codes.EXECUTION_TIMEOUT: Task exceeded the allowed execution time.
codes.EXECUTION_SIDE_EFFECT_BLOCKED: Task attempted a forbidden side effect.

codes.WORKFLOW_UNRESOLVED_REFERENCE: A step referenced a non-existent output.

capability.description: Errors related to missing or incompatible capabilities.

codes.CAPABILITY_NOT_SUPPORTED: Agent does not support the required capability.
codes.CAPABILITY_VERSION_MISMATCH: Protocol or capability version is incompatible.
codes.CAPABILITY_NEGOTIATION_FAILED: Agent and system could not agree on capabilities.

codes.SYSTEM_RESOURCE_EXCEEDED: Memory, CPU, or storage limits exceeded.

usage_notes: All components must return errors using the error envelope.
Workflows may branch based on error categories.
Evaluators may score error handling quality.
Public endpoints must never expose internal system details.
